personalInfo.location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates | Open to Onsite / Hybrid / Remote
personalInfo.summary: **Solution Architect & React Architect** with **15+ years** building **high-scale SaaS platforms** and **cloud-native applications** for **Fortune 500 enterprises**. Expert in **Frontend Architecture (React, Next.js, Micro Frontends)**, **React Native mobile development**, and **AI/LLM Integration (RAG, Vector DBs)**. Proven hands-on engineering leader driving **end-to-end product development** and **cross-functional and distributed team delivery** across **web, iOS, and Android**. Track record of **optimizing system performance by 40%**, **reducing infrastructure costs by 25%**, and delivering **production-grade AI solutions**. **UAE-based** with immediate availability.

workAuthorization: UAE Investor Residence Visa | Immediate Availability | Open to Visa Transfer for Full-Time Roles
availability: Available for full-time employment and contract roles. Consulting and B2B project delivery available through registered UAE entity (Yexaa Technologies FZCO) when required. Open to onsite, hybrid, and remote collaboration.
